case_title: JEANNIE TSAI VS. CITIBANK, N.A. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAI, JEANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. CITIGROUP, INC. NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAI, JEANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TSAI, JEANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. CITIGROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAI, JEANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAI, JEANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JEANNIE TSAI & DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN BILLINGS, ASSISTANT VICE PRESIDENT FOR CITIBANK, N.A. & CITIGROUP, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANTS WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TSAI, JEANNIE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY TSAI, JEANNIE CITIBANK, N.A. CITIGROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. CITIGROUP, INC.
